title: Legacy Extended Hotbar
description: A port of Extended Hotbar to 1.8.9
body:
## Legacy Extended Hotbar

A mod for Legacy Fabric (currently only 1.8.9) that allows swapping the hotbar with the third row of the inventory

 
### Features
- Allows displaying the third row of the inventory on the HUD. Default keybind - P. Holding Shift swaps only the current selected slot
- Allows swapping items between the third row of the inventory and the hotbar. Default keybind - R


**This mod requires [Legacy Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legacy-fabric-api)**  



Credits to DemonWav for making [ExtendedHotbar](https://github.com/DenWav/ExtendedHotbar), the mod that this is based on
